[CHAT WINDOW TEXT] [Sat Oct 18 21:36:56] Items Scrap Forge: Welcome to the ADOH Scrap Forge!
Here you can scrap most of the end-game items in exchange for some Boss Tokens.

Compatible items:
- Nordock weapons and wearables
- Socketable weapons, wearable and gems
- Legendary Purple weapons and weapons

Exchange rates:
- 5 Boss Tokens for any Nordock weapon (melee or ranged) or gloves (+50% if Vengeful)
- 3 Boss Tokens for any Nordock wearable (+50% if Vengeful)
- 7 Boss Tokens for any Socketable weapon (melee or ranged) or gloves (+50% if Vengeful)
- 10 Boss Tokens for any Socketable wearable (+50% if Vengeful)
- Socketable Gems: You will receive the 10% of their cost in the Gems shop in Epic Tokens
- 50 Boss Tokens for any Purple Legendary weapon (melee or ranged) or gloves
- 75 Boss Tokens for any Purple Legendary wearable

Non compatible items won't be scrapped.
Once an item has been scrapped it cannot be restored! Think carefully before proceeding.

You can add multiple items to the forge at once.
